```{r}
###############################################################################
##  7.  Build and print the comprehensive table (no CSV writing) -------------
###############################################################################
comprehensive_table = build_comprehensive_summary_table()

# Filter to show only "all" outcomes if you strictly only want those, 
# or keep both to verify primary is cleaner.
# Here I print the whole table but you can inspect the 'Panel' column.

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("Comprehensive Table with ERROR RATE\n")
cat("Error Rate defined as: #NA / Total Rows (inc. NA)\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Formatting Error Rate as percentage for easier reading
print(comprehensive_table %>% 
        mutate(`Error Rate` = scales::percent(`Error Rate`, accuracy = 0.1)))

###############################################################################
##  8.  Calculate OVERALL ERROR RATE (All Outcomes Only) ---------------------
###############################################################################

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("OVERALL ERROR RATE (All Outcomes Only)\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Filter for "all" outcomes only (exclude primary)
all_outcomes_table = comprehensive_table %>%
  filter(grepl("^all_", Panel))

# Calculate overall error rate across all methods and panels
overall_error_rate = all_outcomes_table %>%
  summarise(
    total_NA = sum(`#NA`),
    total_NA_plus_shown = sum(`#NA`) + sum(`#Shown`),
    overall_error_rate = total_NA / total_NA_plus_shown
  )

cat(sprintf("Total #NA across all methods/panels: %d\n", overall_error_rate$total_NA))
cat(sprintf("Total cases (NA + Shown): %d\n", overall_error_rate$total_NA_plus_shown))
cat(sprintf("Overall Error Rate: %.3f (%s)\n\n", 
            overall_error_rate$overall_error_rate,
            scales::percent(overall_error_rate$overall_error_rate, accuracy = 0.1)))

# Also show breakdown by outcome type and adjustment type
cat("Breakdown by Outcome Type and Adjustment Type:\n")
cat("-----------------------------------------------\n\n")

breakdown_table = all_outcomes_table %>%
  mutate(
    outcome_type = sub("^all_([^_]+)_.*", "\\1", Panel),
    adjustment_type = sub("^all_[^_]+_(.*)", "\\1", Panel)
  ) %>%
  group_by(outcome_type, adjustment_type) %>%
  summarise(
    total_NA = sum(`#NA`),
    total_cases = sum(`#NA`) + sum(`#Shown`),
    error_rate = total_NA / total_cases,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(error_rate_pct = scales::percent(error_rate, accuracy = 0.1))

print(breakdown_table)

cat("\n========================================\n")

# Display all 12 plots in console
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("All plots saved at publication quality (600 dpi, white background)\n")
cat("Plots use outlier-removed data (pg >= 5 removed)\n")
cat("Boxplots use outlier.shape=NA to hide Tukey outliers\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

cat("All Outcomes Plots:\n")
print(p_binary_all_all)
print(p_binary_top3_all)
print(p_binary_baseline_all)
print(p_cont_all_all)
print(p_cont_top3_all)
print(p_cont_baseline_all)

cat("\nPrimary Outcomes Plots:\n")
print(p_binary_all_primary)
print(p_binary_top3_primary)
print(p_binary_baseline_primary)
print(p_cont_all_primary)
print(p_cont_top3_primary)
print(p_cont_baseline_primary)
```
### No manul outlier removed
```{r}
  # First need to filter df_new to get primary and all outcomes datasets
  df_new_all_outcomes = df_new  # All outcomes
  
  # Primary outcomes only (outcomes starting with YP_)
  df_new_primary = df_new %>%
    filter(str_detect(Outcome, "^YP_"))
  
  # Function to prepare long data
  # UPDATED: Includes Covariate columns in selection
  prepare_long_data = function(data) {
    data %>%
      select(outcome_group, starts_with("precision_gain_"), Trial_No, Outcome,
             N_Covariates, N_Covariates_VS1, N_Covariates_VS2) %>% 
      pivot_longer(cols       = starts_with("precision_gain_"),
                   names_to  = "method_raw",
                   values_to = "pg") %>%
      mutate(
        # Keep track of the adjustment type
        adjustment_type = case_when(
          grepl("_Top-3$", method_raw) ~ "Top-3",
          grepl("_Baseline\\+$", method_raw) ~ "Baseline+",
          TRUE ~ "All"
        ),
        # Simplified method names
        method = case_match(
          method_raw,
          # All methods
          "precision_gain_ANCOVA"                       ~ "ANCOVA",
          "precision_gain_ANHECOVA"                     ~ "ANHECOVA",
          "precision_gain_G_Logistic"                   ~ "G-Logistic",
          "precision_gain_DML"                          ~ "DML",
          "precision_gain_TMLE"                         ~ "TMLE",
          "precision_gain_IPW"                          ~ "IPW",
          
          # Top-3 methods
          "precision_gain_ANCOVA_Top-3"                 ~ "ANCOVA",
          "precision_gain_ANHECOVA_Top-3"               ~ "ANHECOVA",
          "precision_gain_G_Logistic_Top-3"             ~ "G-Logistic",
          "precision_gain_DML_Top-3"                    ~ "DML",
          "precision_gain_TMLE_Top-3"                   ~ "TMLE",
          "precision_gain_IPW_Top-3"                    ~ "IPW",
          
          # Baseline+ methods
          "precision_gain_ANCOVA_Baseline+"             ~ "ANCOVA",
          "precision_gain_ANHECOVA_Baseline+"           ~ "ANHECOVA",
          "precision_gain_G_Logistic_Baseline+"         ~ "G-Logistic",
          "precision_gain_DML_Baseline+"                ~ "DML",
          "precision_gain_TMLE_Baseline+"               ~ "TMLE",
          "precision_gain_IPW_Baseline+"                ~ "IPW"
        )) %>%
      filter(!is.na(method))  # Remove rows where method couldn't be matched
  }
  
  # Create long data for both datasets
  df_long_full_all = prepare_long_data(df_new_all_outcomes)
  df_long_full_primary = prepare_long_data(df_new_primary)
  
  # Manual outlier threshold for precision gain
  pg_manual_threshold = 5
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  SELECTIVE OUTLIER REMOVAL FUNCTION ---------------------------------------
  ##  Removes outliers for:
  ##  1. ANHECOVA with adjustment_type == "All" (all outcomes)
  ##  2. IPW with adjustment_type == "All" + outcome_group == "continuous" (primary only)
  ###############################################################################
  apply_selective_outlier_removal = function(data, is_primary = FALSE) {
    if (is_primary) {
      # For primary outcomes: remove ANHECOVA All AND IPW continuous All outliers
      data %>%
        mutate(pg = case_when(
          method == "ANHECOVA" & adjustment_type == "All" & pg >= pg_manual_threshold ~ NA_real_,
          method == "IPW" & adjustment_type == "All" & outcome_group == "continuous" & pg >= pg_manual_threshold ~ NA_real_,
          TRUE ~ pg
        ))
    } else {
      # For all outcomes: only remove ANHECOVA All outliers
      data %>%
        mutate(pg = ifelse(method == "ANHECOVA" & adjustment_type == "All" & pg >= pg_manual_threshold, 
                           NA, 
                           pg))
    }
  }
  
  # Apply selective outlier removal (for plotting only)
  df_long_selective_all = apply_selective_outlier_removal(df_long_full_all, is_primary = FALSE)
  df_long_selective_primary = apply_selective_outlier_removal(df_long_full_primary, is_primary = TRUE)
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  1.  Build ONE comprehensive summary table for ALL plots ------------------
  ##      Columns: Method | #NA | Error Rate | #Tukey | #Shown
  ##      FIXED: Error Rate calculated on ORIGINAL raw data (not selective data)
  ###############################################################################
  
  # Methods that appear on plots by outcome type
  .method_set = list(
    binary     = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA", "G-Logistic", "DML", "TMLE", "IPW"),
    continuous = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA",               "DML", "TMLE", "IPW")
  )
  
  # Compute Tukey bounds per METHOD within the provided panel slice
  compute_tukey_bounds = function(panel_df) {
    panel_df %>%
      filter(!is.na(pg)) %>%
      group_by(method) %>%
      summarise(
        Q1    = quantile(pg, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
        Q3    = quantile(pg, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
        IQR   = Q3 - Q1,
        lower = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR,
        upper = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR,
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  }
  
  build_comprehensive_summary_table = function() {
    outcome_types    = c("binary", "continuous")
    adjustment_types = c("All", "Top-3", "Baseline+")
    data_types       = c("all", "primary")
    
    all_rows = list()
    
    for (data_type in data_types) {
      # FIXED: Use ORIGINAL raw data for error rate calculation
      df_raw_original = if (data_type == "primary") df_long_full_primary else df_long_full_all
      
      # Use selective data for plotting statistics (#Tukey, #Shown)
      df_raw_selective = if (data_type == "primary") df_long_selective_primary else df_long_selective_all
      
      for (outcome_type in outcome_types) {
        shown_methods = .method_set[[outcome_type]]
        
        for (vs_type in adjustment_types) {
          # ---------- RAW slice from ORIGINAL data (for error rate)
          raw_slice_original = df_raw_original %>%
            filter(outcome_group == outcome_type,
                   adjustment_type == vs_type,
                   method %in% shown_methods)
          
          # ---------- RAW slice from SELECTIVE data (for Tukey and Shown)
          raw_slice_selective = df_raw_selective %>%
            filter(outcome_group == outcome_type,
                   adjustment_type == vs_type,
                   method %in% shown_methods)
          
          # ---------- Calculate Error Rate on ORIGINAL data (Where Covariates != 0)
          error_stats = raw_slice_original %>%
            mutate(relevant_n_cov = case_when(
              adjustment_type == "Top-3"     ~ N_Covariates_VS1,
              adjustment_type == "Baseline+" ~ N_Covariates_VS2,
              TRUE                           ~ N_Covariates # Default to "All"
            )) %>%
            filter(relevant_n_cov != 0) %>% # Exclude trials where no covariates existed
            group_by(method) %>%
            summarise(
              `#NA` = sum(is.na(pg)),
              n_valid_trials = n(),
              `Error Rate` = `#NA` / n_valid_trials,
              .groups = "drop"
            ) %>%
            select(method, `#NA`, `Error Rate`)
          
          # ---------- Outlier Stats on SELECTIVE data (non-NA data)
          non_na = raw_slice_selective %>% filter(!is.na(pg))
          
          # Tukey outliers (computed on selective data)
          tb = compute_tukey_bounds(raw_slice_selective)
          tukey_tbl = non_na %>%
            inner_join(tb, by = "method") %>%
            group_by(method) %>%
            summarise(`#Tukey` = sum(pg < lower | pg > upper, na.rm = TRUE),
                      .groups = "drop")
          
          # #Shown (all non-NA values in selective data)
          shown_tbl = non_na %>%
            group_by(method) %>%
            summarise(`#Shown` = n(), .groups = "drop")
          
          # ---------- Combine and order
          combo = error_stats %>%
            full_join(tukey_tbl,  by = "method") %>%
            full_join(shown_tbl,  by = "method") %>%
            mutate(across(c(`#NA`, `#Tukey`, `#Shown`), ~ replace_na(., 0L))) %>%
            mutate(`Error Rate` = replace_na(`Error Rate`, 0)) %>%
            filter(method %in% shown_methods) %>%
            arrange(factor(method, levels = shown_methods)) %>%
            mutate(Panel = paste(data_type, outcome_type, vs_type, sep = "_")) %>%
            select(Method = method, `#NA`, `Error Rate`, `#Tukey`, `#Shown`, Panel)
          
          all_rows[[length(all_rows) + 1]] = combo
        }
      }
    }
    
    bind_rows(all_rows)
  }
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  2.  Color palette matching smooth plots ---------------------------------
  ###############################################################################
  # Define color palette (IPW changed to purple to differentiate from ANCOVA)
  method_colors = c(
    "ANCOVA"     = "#F8766D",    # Red
    "ANHECOVA"   = "#B79F00",    # Gold/Yellow
    "G-Logistic" = "#00BA38",    # Green
    "DML"        = "#00BFC4",    # Cyan
    "TMLE"       = "#619CFF",    # Blue
    "IPW"        = "#C77CFF"     # Purple
  )
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  3.  Plot function with colors and improved text size ---------------------
  ###############################################################################
  make_plot = function(data, outcome_type) {
    
    # Transform variance ratio to proportional variance reduction (1 - original value)
    data = data %>%
      filter(!is.na(pg)) %>%
      mutate(prop_var_reduction = 1 - pg)
    
    # Set factor levels based on outcome type
    if (outcome_type == "binary") {
      method_levels = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA", "G-Logistic", "DML", "TMLE", "IPW")
    } else {
      method_levels = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA", "DML", "TMLE", "IPW")  # no G-Logistic
    }
    
    data = data %>%
      mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_levels))
    
    # Counts for labels
    method_counts = data %>%
      group_by(method) %>%
      summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
    
    # x-axis label positions
    x_labels_df = data.frame(
      method = method_levels[method_levels %in% unique(data$method)],
      x_pos  = 1:length(method_levels[method_levels %in% unique(data$method)])
    )
    
    x_labels_counts = x_labels_df %>%
      left_join(method_counts, by = "method")
    
    p = ggplot(data, aes(method, prop_var_reduction, fill = method)) +
      geom_boxplot(colour = "grey25", alpha = .50, width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = method_colors) +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportional Variance Reduction") +
      coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 1), clip = "off") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
      theme(
        axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x  = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title.y  = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.position  = "none",
        plot.margin      = margin(t = 5, r = 10, b = 60, l = 10)
      ) +
      geom_text(data = x_labels_counts, 
                aes(x = x_pos, y = -1.15, label = method),
                inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 5.5, lineheight = 0.85, hjust = 0.5) +
      geom_text(data = x_labels_counts, 
                aes(x = x_pos, y = -1.35, label = paste0("(", n, ")")),
                inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4.5, hjust = 0.5)
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  Publication quality settings ---------------------------------------------
  ###############################################################################
  pub_width  = 10
  pub_height = 6.5
  pub_dpi    = 600  # 600 dpi for publication quality
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  4.  Create output directory ----------------------------------------------
  ###############################################################################
  output_dir = "cleaned_data/plot/exam plot"
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  5.  Generate all plots (All outcomes) ------------------------------------
  ###############################################################################
  
  # All methods - All outcomes
  df_binary_all_all = df_long_selective_all %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "binary", adjustment_type == "All")
  
  p_binary_all_all = make_plot(df_binary_all_all, "binary")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_binary_all_all_selective.png"), 
         p_binary_all_all, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  # Top-3 methods - All outcomes
  df_binary_top3_all = df_long_selective_all %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "binary", adjustment_type == "Top-3")
  
  p_binary_top3_all = make_plot(df_binary_top3_all, "binary")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_binary_top3_all_selective.png"), 
         p_binary_top3_all, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  # Baseline+ methods - All outcomes
  df_binary_baseline_all = df_long_selective_all %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "binary", adjustment_type == "Baseline+")
  
  p_binary_baseline_all = make_plot(df_binary_baseline_all, "binary")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_binary_baseline_all_selective.png"), 
         p_binary_baseline_all, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  # Continuous plots - All outcomes
  df_continuous_all_all = df_long_selective_all %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "continuous", adjustment_type == "All")
  
  p_cont_all_all = make_plot(df_continuous_all_all, "continuous")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_continuous_all_all_selective.png"), 
         p_cont_all_all, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  df_continuous_top3_all = df_long_selective_all %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "continuous", adjustment_type == "Top-3")
  
  p_cont_top3_all = make_plot(df_continuous_top3_all, "continuous")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_continuous_top3_all_selective.png"), 
         p_cont_top3_all, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  df_continuous_baseline_all = df_long_selective_all %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "continuous", adjustment_type == "Baseline+")
  
  p_cont_baseline_all = make_plot(df_continuous_baseline_all, "continuous")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_continuous_baseline_all_selective.png"), 
         p_cont_baseline_all, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  6.  Generate all plots (Primary outcomes only) ---------------------------
  ###############################################################################
  
  # All methods - Primary outcomes
  df_binary_all_primary = df_long_selective_primary %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "binary", adjustment_type == "All")
  
  p_binary_all_primary = make_plot(df_binary_all_primary, "binary")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_binary_all_primary_selective.png"), 
         p_binary_all_primary, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  # Top-3 methods - Primary outcomes
  df_binary_top3_primary = df_long_selective_primary %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "binary", adjustment_type == "Top-3")
  
  p_binary_top3_primary = make_plot(df_binary_top3_primary, "binary")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_binary_top3_primary_selective.png"), 
         p_binary_top3_primary, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  # Baseline+ methods - Primary outcomes
  df_binary_baseline_primary = df_long_selective_primary %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "binary", adjustment_type == "Baseline+")
  
  p_binary_baseline_primary = make_plot(df_binary_baseline_primary, "binary")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_binary_baseline_primary_selective.png"), 
         p_binary_baseline_primary, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  # Continuous plots - Primary outcomes
  df_continuous_all_primary = df_long_selective_primary %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "continuous", adjustment_type == "All")
  
  p_cont_all_primary = make_plot(df_continuous_all_primary, "continuous")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_continuous_all_primary_selective.png"), 
         p_cont_all_primary, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  df_continuous_top3_primary = df_long_selective_primary %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "continuous", adjustment_type == "Top-3")
  
  p_cont_top3_primary = make_plot(df_continuous_top3_primary, "continuous")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_continuous_top3_primary_selective.png"), 
         p_cont_top3_primary, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  df_continuous_baseline_primary = df_long_selective_primary %>% 
    filter(outcome_group == "continuous", adjustment_type == "Baseline+")
  
  p_cont_baseline_primary = make_plot(df_continuous_baseline_primary, "continuous")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "precision_gain_continuous_baseline_primary_selective.png"), 
         p_cont_baseline_primary, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  7.  Build and print the comprehensive table (no CSV writing) -------------
  ###############################################################################
  comprehensive_table = build_comprehensive_summary_table()
  
  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("Comprehensive Table with ERROR RATE\n")
  cat("Error Rate calculated on ORIGINAL raw data (not selective data)\n")
  cat("SELECTIVE outlier removal for PLOTTING:\n")
  cat("  - All outcomes: ANHECOVA All (pg >= 5)\n")
  cat("  - Primary outcomes: ANHECOVA All (pg >= 5) + IPW continuous All (pg >= 5)\n")
  cat("All other methods show full data\n")
  cat("========================================\n\n")
  
  # Formatting Error Rate as percentage for easier reading
  print(comprehensive_table %>% 
          mutate(`Error Rate` = scales::percent(`Error Rate`, accuracy = 0.1)))
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  8.  Calculate OVERALL ERROR RATE (All Outcomes Only) ---------------------
  ###############################################################################
  
  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("OVERALL ERROR RATE (All Outcomes Only)\n")
  cat("========================================\n\n")
  
  # Filter for "all" outcomes only (exclude primary)
  all_outcomes_table = comprehensive_table %>%
    filter(grepl("^all_", Panel))
  
  # Calculate overall error rate across all methods and panels
  overall_error_rate = all_outcomes_table %>%
    summarise(
      total_NA = sum(`#NA`),
      total_NA_plus_shown = sum(`#NA`) + sum(`#Shown`),
      overall_error_rate = total_NA / total_NA_plus_shown
    )
  
  cat(sprintf("Total #NA across all methods/panels: %d\n", overall_error_rate$total_NA))
  cat(sprintf("Total cases (NA + Shown): %d\n", overall_error_rate$total_NA_plus_shown))
  cat(sprintf("Overall Error Rate: %.3f (%s)\n\n", 
              overall_error_rate$overall_error_rate,
              scales::percent(overall_error_rate$overall_error_rate, accuracy = 0.1)))
  
  # Also show breakdown by outcome type and adjustment type
  cat("Breakdown by Outcome Type and Adjustment Type:\n")
  cat("-----------------------------------------------\n\n")
  
  breakdown_table = all_outcomes_table %>%
    mutate(
      outcome_type = sub("^all_([^_]+)_.*", "\\1", Panel),
      adjustment_type = sub("^all_[^_]+_(.*)", "\\1", Panel)
    ) %>%
    group_by(outcome_type, adjustment_type) %>%
    summarise(
      total_NA = sum(`#NA`),
      total_cases = sum(`#NA`) + sum(`#Shown`),
      error_rate = total_NA / total_cases,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(error_rate_pct = scales::percent(error_rate, accuracy = 0.1))
  
  print(breakdown_table)
  
  ###############################################################################
  ##  9.  Count removed outliers ---------------------------------------------
  ###############################################################################
  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("OUTLIER REMOVAL IMPACT\n")
  cat("========================================\n\n")
  
  # Count outliers removed for ANHECOVA All across both outcome types (all outcomes)
  cat("ALL OUTCOMES - ANHECOVA All outliers removed:\n")
  anhecova_all_outliers = df_long_full_all %>%
    filter(method == "ANHECOVA", adjustment_type == "All", !is.na(pg)) %>%
    mutate(is_outlier = pg >= pg_manual_threshold) %>%
    group_by(outcome_group) %>%
    summarise(
      total = n(),
      outliers_removed = sum(is_outlier),
      pct_removed = 100 * outliers_removed / total,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  print(anhecova_all_outliers)
  
  # Count outliers removed for IPW continuous All (primary outcomes only)
  cat("\nPRIMARY OUTCOMES - IPW continuous All outliers removed:\n")
  ipw_cont_primary_outliers = df_long_full_primary %>%
    filter(method == "IPW", adjustment_type == "All", outcome_group == "continuous", !is.na(pg)) %>%
    mutate(is_outlier = pg >= pg_manual_threshold) %>%
    summarise(
      total = n(),
      outliers_removed = sum(is_outlier),
      pct_removed = 100 * outliers_removed / total
    )
  
  print(ipw_cont_primary_outliers)
  
  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("All plots saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
  cat("All plots saved at publication quality (600 dpi, white background)\n")
  cat("Boxplots use outlier.shape=NA to hide Tukey outliers\n")
  cat("SELECTIVE outlier removal for PLOTTING:\n")
  cat("  - All outcomes: ANHECOVA All (pg >= 5)\n")
  cat("  - Primary outcomes: ANHECOVA All (pg >= 5) + IPW continuous All (pg >= 5)\n")
  cat("Error rates calculated on ORIGINAL raw data for all methods\n")
  cat("========================================\n\n")
  
  # Display all 12 plots in console
  cat("All Outcomes Plots:\n")
  print(p_binary_all_all)
  print(p_binary_top3_all)
  print(p_binary_baseline_all)
  print(p_cont_all_all)
  print(p_cont_top3_all)
  print(p_cont_baseline_all)
  
  cat("\nPrimary Outcomes Plots:\n")
  print(p_binary_all_primary)
  print(p_binary_top3_primary)
  print(p_binary_baseline_primary)
  print(p_cont_all_primary)
  print(p_cont_top3_primary)
  print(p_cont_baseline_primary)
```
### Individual SL
```{r}
###############################################################################
##  BOXPLOTS FOR INDIVIDUAL ML METHODS - PVR ANALYSIS ------------------------
##  Generates both manual outlier removed and unremoved plots
###############################################################################

# Individual SL methods (All covariates - base versions only, no VS1 or VS2)
individual_sl_methods = c("SL_glm", "SL_glmnet", "SL_rpart", "SL_gam", "SL_randomForest", 
                          "SL_nnet", "SL_svm", "SL_xgboost", "SL_bartMachine")

# Manual outlier threshold for precision gain (same as main analysis)
pg_manual_threshold = 5

###############################################################################
##  Function to prepare long data for individual ML methods ------------------
###############################################################################
prepare_ml_long_data = function(data, outcome_type) {
  
  # Filter by outcome type
  if (outcome_type == "continuous") {
    data_filtered = data %>%
      filter(`Outcome Type` %in% c("continuous", "continuous proportion"))
  } else if (outcome_type == "binary") {
    data_filtered = data %>%
      filter(`Outcome Type` %in% c("binary", "composite binary"))
  }
  
  # Initialize list to store data for each method
  all_method_data = list()
  
  # Loop through each individual SL method
  for (method in individual_sl_methods) {
    # Get the precision gain column name for this method (base version only)
    pg_col = paste0("How much precision gain can ", method, "_TMLE provide?")
    
    # Check if column exists
    if (pg_col %in% colnames(data_filtered)) {
      # Extract precision gain values and create dataframe
      method_data = data.frame(
        method = method,
        pg = data_filtered[[pg_col]],
        pvr = 1 - data_filtered[[pg_col]],  # Proportional Variance Reduction
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      all_method_data[[length(all_method_data) + 1]] = method_data
    }
  }
  
  # Combine all methods into one dataframe
  if (length(all_method_data) > 0) {
    result = bind_rows(all_method_data)
    return(result)
  } else {
    return(data.frame())
  }
}

###############################################################################
##  Color palette for individual ML methods ----------------------------------
###############################################################################
ml_method_colors = c(
  "SL_glm"           = "#F8766D",    # Red
  "SL_glmnet"        = "#B79F00",    # Gold
  "SL_rpart"         = "#00BA38",    # Green
  "SL_gam"           = "#00BFC4",    # Cyan
  "SL_randomForest"  = "#619CFF",    # Blue
  "SL_nnet"          = "#C77CFF",    # Purple
  "SL_svm"           = "#F564E3",    # Magenta
  "SL_xgboost"       = "#00C19F",    # Teal
  "SL_bartMachine"   = "#FF6E42"     # Orange-red
)

###############################################################################
##  Plot function for individual ML methods ----------------------------------
###############################################################################
make_ml_plot = function(data, outcome_type, remove_outliers = FALSE) {
  
  # Filter out NA values
  data = data %>% filter(!is.na(pvr))
  
  # Apply manual outlier removal if requested
  if (remove_outliers) {
    data = data %>% filter(pg < pg_manual_threshold)
  }
  
  # Set factor levels to match the order in individual_sl_methods
  data = data %>%
    mutate(method = factor(method, levels = individual_sl_methods))
  
  # Counts for labels
  method_counts = data %>%
    group_by(method) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
  
  # x-axis label positions
  available_methods = individual_sl_methods[individual_sl_methods %in% unique(data$method)]
  x_labels_df = data.frame(
    method = available_methods,
    x_pos  = 1:length(available_methods)
  )
  
  x_labels_counts = x_labels_df %>%
    left_join(method_counts, by = "method")
  
  # Clean method names for display (remove "SL_" prefix)
  x_labels_counts = x_labels_counts %>%
    mutate(display_name = gsub("^SL_", "", method))
  
  # Create plot
  p = ggplot(data, aes(method, pvr, fill = method)) +
    geom_boxplot(colour = "grey25", alpha = .50, width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = ml_method_colors) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportional Variance Reduction") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-2, 2), clip = "off") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x  = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 16),
      axis.title.y  = element_text(size = 18),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      legend.position  = "none",
      plot.margin      = margin(t = 5, r = 10, b = 60, l = 10)
    ) +
    geom_text(data = x_labels_counts, 
              aes(x = x_pos, y = -2.3, label = display_name),
              inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 5.5, lineheight = 0.85, hjust = 0.5) +
    geom_text(data = x_labels_counts, 
              aes(x = x_pos, y = -2.7, label = paste0("(", n, ")")),
              inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4.5, hjust = 0.5)
  
  return(p)
}

###############################################################################
##  Publication quality settings ---------------------------------------------
###############################################################################
pub_width  = 12   # Slightly wider to accommodate 9 methods
pub_height = 6.5
pub_dpi    = 600

###############################################################################
##  Create output directory --------------------------------------------------
###############################################################################
output_dir = "cleaned_data/plot/exam plot"
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

###############################################################################
##  Prepare data for both outcome types --------------------------------------
###############################################################################
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("Preparing data for individual ML methods\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Prepare long data for binary and continuous outcomes
df_ml_binary = prepare_ml_long_data(df_comparison, "binary")
df_ml_continuous = prepare_ml_long_data(df_comparison, "continuous")

cat("Binary outcomes: ", nrow(df_ml_binary), " total observations\n")
cat("Continuous outcomes: ", nrow(df_ml_continuous), " total observations\n\n")

###############################################################################
##  Generate Binary Outcome Plots --------------------------------------------
###############################################################################
cat("Generating binary outcome plots...\n")

# Binary - Without manual outlier removal
p_binary_unremoved = make_ml_plot(df_ml_binary, "binary", remove_outliers = FALSE)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "ml_individual_binary_unremoved.png"), 
       p_binary_unremoved, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

# Binary - With manual outlier removal
p_binary_removed = make_ml_plot(df_ml_binary, "binary", remove_outliers = TRUE)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "ml_individual_binary_removed.png"), 
       p_binary_removed, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

###############################################################################
##  Generate Continuous Outcome Plots ----------------------------------------
###############################################################################
cat("Generating continuous outcome plots...\n")

# Continuous - Without manual outlier removal
p_continuous_unremoved = make_ml_plot(df_ml_continuous, "continuous", remove_outliers = FALSE)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "ml_individual_continuous_unremoved.png"), 
       p_continuous_unremoved, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

# Continuous - With manual outlier removal
p_continuous_removed = make_ml_plot(df_ml_continuous, "continuous", remove_outliers = TRUE)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "ml_individual_continuous_removed.png"), 
       p_continuous_removed, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

###############################################################################
##  Summary Statistics -------------------------------------------------------
###############################################################################
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("SUMMARY STATISTICS\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Function to calculate summary stats
calculate_summary_stats = function(data, outcome_type, remove_outliers = FALSE) {
  
  # Filter out NA values
  data_clean = data %>% filter(!is.na(pvr))
  
  if (remove_outliers) {
    data_clean = data_clean %>% filter(pg < pg_manual_threshold)
  }
  
  stats = data_clean %>%
    group_by(method) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      n_na = sum(is.na(pvr)),
      mean_pvr = mean(pvr, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_pvr = median(pvr, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_pvr = sd(pvr, na.rm = TRUE),
      q25 = quantile(pvr, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75 = quantile(pvr, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(across(c(mean_pvr, median_pvr, sd_pvr, q25, q75), ~ round(., 4)))
  
  return(stats)
}

# Binary outcomes
cat("BINARY OUTCOMES\n")
cat("----------------------------------------\n")
cat("Without manual outlier removal:\n\n")
binary_stats_unremoved = calculate_summary_stats(df_ml_binary, "binary", remove_outliers = FALSE)
print(binary_stats_unremoved)

cat("\n\nWith manual outlier removal (pg >= 5):\n\n")
binary_stats_removed = calculate_summary_stats(df_ml_binary, "binary", remove_outliers = TRUE)
print(binary_stats_removed)

# Continuous outcomes
cat("\n\n========================================\n")
cat("CONTINUOUS OUTCOMES\n")
cat("----------------------------------------\n")
cat("Without manual outlier removal:\n\n")
continuous_stats_unremoved = calculate_summary_stats(df_ml_continuous, "continuous", remove_outliers = FALSE)
print(continuous_stats_unremoved)

cat("\n\nWith manual outlier removal (pg >= 5):\n\n")
continuous_stats_removed = calculate_summary_stats(df_ml_continuous, "continuous", remove_outliers = TRUE)
print(continuous_stats_removed)

###############################################################################
##  Count outliers removed ---------------------------------------------------
###############################################################################
cat("\n\n========================================\n")
cat("OUTLIER REMOVAL IMPACT\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Binary
cat("BINARY OUTCOMES:\n")
binary_before = df_ml_binary %>% filter(!is.na(pg)) %>% nrow()
binary_after = df_ml_binary %>% filter(!is.na(pg), pg < pg_manual_threshold) %>% nrow()
binary_removed_count = binary_before - binary_after

cat(sprintf("Total observations (non-NA): %d\n", binary_before))
cat(sprintf("After removing pg >= 5: %d\n", binary_after))
cat(sprintf("Number removed: %d (%.1f%%)\n\n", 
            binary_removed_count, 
            100 * binary_removed_count / binary_before))

# By method for binary
binary_outlier_counts = df_ml_binary %>%
  filter(!is.na(pg)) %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    outliers = sum(pg >= pg_manual_threshold),
    pct_outliers = 100 * outliers / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(outliers))

print(binary_outlier_counts)

# Continuous
cat("\n\nCONTINUOUS OUTCOMES:\n")
continuous_before = df_ml_continuous %>% filter(!is.na(pg)) %>% nrow()
continuous_after = df_ml_continuous %>% filter(!is.na(pg), pg < pg_manual_threshold) %>% nrow()
continuous_removed_count = continuous_before - continuous_after

cat(sprintf("Total observations (non-NA): %d\n", continuous_before))
cat(sprintf("After removing pg >= 5: %d\n", continuous_after))
cat(sprintf("Number removed: %d (%.1f%%)\n\n", 
            continuous_removed_count, 
            100 * continuous_removed_count / continuous_before))

# By method for continuous
continuous_outlier_counts = df_ml_continuous %>%
  filter(!is.na(pg)) %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    outliers = sum(pg >= pg_manual_threshold),
    pct_outliers = 100 * outliers / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(outliers))

print(continuous_outlier_counts)

###############################################################################
##  Display plots ------------------------------------------------------------
###############################################################################
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("All plots saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("Publication quality: 600 dpi, white background\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

cat("Binary Outcome Plots:\n")
print(p_binary_unremoved)
print(p_binary_removed)

cat("\nContinuous Outcome Plots:\n")
print(p_continuous_unremoved)
print(p_continuous_removed)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("PLOT FILES GENERATED:\n")
cat("========================================\n")
cat("1. ml_individual_binary_unremoved.png\n")
cat("2. ml_individual_binary_removed.png\n")
cat("3. ml_individual_continuous_unremoved.png\n")
cat("4. ml_individual_continuous_removed.png\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")
```

## Scaled Diff
### Manul outlier removed
```{r}
###############################################################################
##  DIFFERENCE VIOLIN PLOTS (OUTLIERS REMOVED FOR PLOTS + BIG SUMMARY TABLE)
###############################################################################

###############################################################################
##  0.  Long data for differences --------------------------------------------
###############################################################################

# Function to prepare long data for differences
prepare_long_diff_data = function(data) {
  data %>%
    select(outcome_group, starts_with("diff_")) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols      = starts_with("diff_"),
                 names_to  = "method_raw",
                 values_to = "diff") %>%
    mutate(
      # Keep track of the adjustment type
      adjustment_type = case_when(
        grepl("_Top-3$", method_raw) ~ "Top-3",
        grepl("_Baseline\\+$", method_raw) ~ "Baseline+",
        TRUE ~ "All"
      ),
      # Simplified method names
      method = case_match(
        method_raw,
        # All methods
        "diff_ANCOVA"                       ~ "ANCOVA",
        "diff_ANHECOVA"                     ~ "ANHECOVA",
        "diff_G_Logistic"                   ~ "G-Logistic",
        "diff_DML"                          ~ "DML",
        "diff_TMLE"                         ~ "TMLE",
        "diff_IPW"                          ~ "IPW",
        
        # Top-3 methods
        "diff_ANCOVA_Top-3"                 ~ "ANCOVA",
        "diff_ANHECOVA_Top-3"               ~ "ANHECOVA",
        "diff_G_Logistic_Top-3"             ~ "G-Logistic",
        "diff_DML_Top-3"                    ~ "DML",
        "diff_TMLE_Top-3"                   ~ "TMLE",
        "diff_IPW_Top-3"                    ~ "IPW",
        
        # Baseline+ methods
        "diff_ANCOVA_Baseline+"             ~ "ANCOVA",
        "diff_ANHECOVA_Baseline+"           ~ "ANHECOVA",
        "diff_G_Logistic_Baseline+"         ~ "G-Logistic",
        "diff_DML_Baseline+"                ~ "DML",
        "diff_TMLE_Baseline+"               ~ "TMLE",
        "diff_IPW_Baseline+"                ~ "IPW"
      )) %>%
    filter(!is.na(method))  # Remove rows where method couldn't be matched
}

# Create long data for both datasets
df_long_diff_full_all     = prepare_long_diff_data(df_new_all_outcomes)
df_long_diff_full_primary = prepare_long_diff_data(df_new_primary)

# Methods actually shown on plots by outcome type
.diff_method_set = list(
  binary     = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA", "G-Logistic", "DML", "TMLE", "IPW"),
  continuous = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA",               "DML", "TMLE", "IPW")
)

# Manual "extreme" outlier threshold for differences
diff_manual_threshold = 8

###############################################################################
##  1.  Helpers: outlier removal for plotting --------------------------------
##      Remove points where |diff| > 5 (manual threshold)
###############################################################################

# Remove outliers for plotting: drop manual |diff| > threshold
remove_diff_outliers_panel = function(panel_df) {
  panel_df %>%
    mutate(
      is_manual_out = abs(diff) > diff_manual_threshold
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(diff), !is_manual_out) %>%
    select(-is_manual_out)
}

###############################################################################
##  2.  Table builder for differences (BIG summary across all panels) ---------
##      Columns: Method | #NA | #Outlier(Manual) | #Tukey | #Shown | Panel
##      - #NA:               missing diff in raw slice
##      - #Outlier(Manual):  abs(diff) > diff_manual_threshold in raw non-NA
##      - #Tukey:            Tukey outliers hidden by outlier.shape=NA
##      - #Shown:            count after removing manual outliers (shown in plots)
###############################################################################

# Compute Tukey bounds per METHOD within the provided panel slice
compute_tukey_bounds = function(panel_df) {
  panel_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(diff)) %>%
    group_by(method) %>%
    summarise(
      Q1    = quantile(diff, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      Q3    = quantile(diff, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      IQR   = Q3 - Q1,
      lower = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR,
      upper = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

build_comprehensive_diff_table = function() {
  outcome_types    = c("binary", "continuous")
  adjustment_types = c("All", "Top-3", "Baseline+")
  data_types       = c("all", "primary")
  
  all_rows = list()
  
  for (data_type in data_types) {
    df_raw = if (data_type == "primary") df_long_diff_full_primary else df_long_diff_full_all
    
    for (outcome_type in outcome_types) {
      method_levels = .diff_method_set[[outcome_type]]
      
      for (vs_type in adjustment_types) {
        # Raw slice for this panel (restrict to methods shown on plots)
        raw_slice = df_raw %>%
          filter(outcome_group == outcome_type,
                 adjustment_type == vs_type,
                 method %in% method_levels)
        
        # #NA
        nas = raw_slice %>%
          group_by(method) %>%
          summarise(`#NA` = sum(is.na(diff)), .groups = "drop")
        
        # Non-NA for outlier counting
        non_na = raw_slice %>% filter(!is.na(diff))
        
        # Manual outliers (|diff| > threshold)
        manual_tbl = non_na %>%
          group_by(method) %>%
          summarise(`#Outlier(Manual)` = sum(abs(diff) > diff_manual_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
                    .groups = "drop")
        
        # Tukey outliers (for reference - hidden by outlier.shape=NA in plots)
        tb = compute_tukey_bounds(raw_slice)
        tukey_tbl = non_na %>%
          inner_join(tb, by = "method") %>%
          group_by(method) %>%
          summarise(`#Tukey` = sum(diff < lower | diff > upper, na.rm = TRUE),
                    .groups = "drop")
        
        # #Shown = after removing manual outliers (what appears in plots)
        cleaned = remove_diff_outliers_panel(raw_slice %>% filter(!is.na(diff)))
        shown_tbl = cleaned %>%
          group_by(method) %>%
          summarise(`#Shown` = n(), .groups = "drop")
        
        # Combine
        combo = nas %>%
          full_join(manual_tbl, by = "method") %>%
          full_join(tukey_tbl,  by = "method") %>%
          full_join(shown_tbl,  by = "method") %>%
          mutate(across(-method, ~ replace_na(., 0L))) %>%
          filter(method %in% method_levels) %>%
          arrange(factor(method, levels = method_levels)) %>%
          mutate(Panel = paste(data_type, outcome_type, vs_type, sep = "_")) %>%
          select(Method = method, `#NA`, `#Outlier(Manual)`, `#Tukey`, `#Shown`, Panel)
        
        all_rows[[length(all_rows) + 1]] = combo
      }
    }
  }
  
  bind_rows(all_rows)
}

###############################################################################
##  3.  Plot function for differences (uses OUTLIER-REMOVED data) ------------
###############################################################################
make_diff_plot = function(panel_clean_df, outcome_type) {
  
  # Set factor levels based on outcome type
  if (outcome_type == "binary") {
    method_levels = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA", "G-Logistic", "DML", "TMLE", "IPW")
  } else {
    method_levels = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA", "DML", "TMLE", "IPW")  # no G-Logistic
  }
  
  data = panel_clean_df %>%
    mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_levels))
  
  # Counts for labels (post-removal; equals #Shown)
  method_counts = data %>%
    group_by(method) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
  
  # x-axis label positions
  x_labels_df = data.frame(
    method = method_levels[method_levels %in% unique(data$method)],
    x_pos   = 1:length(method_levels[method_levels %in% unique(data$method)])
  )
  
  x_labels_counts = x_labels_df %>%
    left_join(method_counts, by = "method")
  
  p = ggplot(data, aes(method, diff, fill = method)) +
    geom_boxplot(colour = "grey25", alpha = .50, width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = method_colors) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Difference from Unadjusted Estimate") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3, 3), clip = "off") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(-3, -1.5, 0, 1.5, 3))+
    theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x  = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 16),
      axis.title.y  = element_text(size = 18),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      legend.position  = "none",
      plot.margin      = margin(t = 5, r = 10, b = 60, l = 10)
    ) +
    geom_text(data = x_labels_counts, 
              aes(x = x_pos, y = -3.45, label = method),
              inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 5.5, lineheight = 0.85, hjust = 0.5) +
    geom_text(data = x_labels_counts, 
              aes(x = x_pos, y = -4.05, label = paste0("(", n, ")")),
              inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4.5, hjust = 0.5)
  
  return(p)
}

###############################################################################
##  4.  Generate all difference plots (using OUTLIER-REMOVED data) -----------
###############################################################################

# Helper to get raw panel slice (before removal) given scopes
get_raw_panel = function(data_source, outcome_type, vs_type) {
  method_levels = .diff_method_set[[outcome_type]]
  data_source %>%
    filter(outcome_group == outcome_type,
           adjustment_type == vs_type,
           method %in% method_levels)
}

# Publication quality settings (assumes you defined method_colors elsewhere)
pub_width  = 10
pub_height = 6.5
pub_dpi    = 600

## ---- All outcomes
# Binary
raw_bin_all   = get_raw_panel(df_long_diff_full_all, "binary", "All")
clean_bin_all = remove_diff_outliers_panel(raw_bin_all)
p_diff_binary_all_all = make_diff_plot(clean_bin_all, "binary")
ggsave("cleaned_data/Plot/difference_binary_all_all.png",
       p_diff_binary_all_all, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

raw_bin_top3   = get_raw_panel(df_long_diff_full_all, "binary", "Top-3")
```

### No manul outlier removed
```{r}
###############################################################################
##  DIFFERENCE PLOTS (SELECTIVE MANUAL OUTLIER REMOVAL)
##  Removes outliers for: ANHECOVA with outcome_group == "continuous" & adjustment_type == "All"
###############################################################################

###############################################################################
##  0.  Long data for differences (already created in previous chunk) --------
###############################################################################
# df_long_diff_full_all and df_long_diff_full_primary already exist

# Manual "extreme" outlier threshold for differences
diff_manual_threshold = 8

###############################################################################
##  SELECTIVE OUTLIER REMOVAL FUNCTION FOR DIFFERENCES ----------------------
##  Removes outliers ONLY for:
##  ANHECOVA with adjustment_type == "All" & outcome_group == "continuous"
###############################################################################
apply_selective_diff_outlier_removal = function(data) {
  data %>%
    mutate(diff = ifelse(
      method == "ANHECOVA" & adjustment_type == "All" & outcome_group == "continuous" & abs(diff) > diff_manual_threshold,
      NA_real_,
      diff
    ))
}

# Apply selective outlier removal
df_long_diff_selective_all = apply_selective_diff_outlier_removal(df_long_diff_full_all)
df_long_diff_selective_primary = apply_selective_diff_outlier_removal(df_long_diff_full_primary)

###############################################################################
##  1.  Build comprehensive summary table (SELECTIVE outlier removal) --------
##      Columns: Method | #NA | #Outlier(Manual) | #Tukey | #Shown | Panel
##      Error Rate calculated on ORIGINAL raw data (not selective data)
###############################################################################

build_comprehensive_diff_table_selective = function() {
  outcome_types    = c("binary", "continuous")
  adjustment_types = c("All", "Top-3", "Baseline+")
  data_types       = c("all", "primary")
  
  all_rows = list()
  
  for (data_type in data_types) {
    # ORIGINAL data for #NA calculation
    df_raw_original = if (data_type == "primary") df_long_diff_full_primary else df_long_diff_full_all
    
    # SELECTIVE data for plotting statistics
    df_raw_selective = if (data_type == "primary") df_long_diff_selective_primary else df_long_diff_selective_all
    
    for (outcome_type in outcome_types) {
      method_levels = .diff_method_set[[outcome_type]]
      
      for (vs_type in adjustment_types) {
        # ---------- RAW slice from ORIGINAL data (for #NA)
        raw_slice_original = df_raw_original %>%
          filter(outcome_group == outcome_type,
                 adjustment_type == vs_type,
                 method %in% method_levels)
        
        # ---------- RAW slice from SELECTIVE data (for Tukey and Shown)
        raw_slice_selective = df_raw_selective %>%
          filter(outcome_group == outcome_type,
                 adjustment_type == vs_type,
                 method %in% method_levels)
        
        # #NA from ORIGINAL data
        nas = raw_slice_original %>%
          group_by(method) %>%
          summarise(`#NA` = sum(is.na(diff)), .groups = "drop")
        
        # Non-NA from ORIGINAL data for manual outlier counting
        non_na_original = raw_slice_original %>% filter(!is.na(diff))
        
        # Manual outliers (|diff| > threshold) from ORIGINAL data
        manual_tbl = non_na_original %>%
          group_by(method) %>%
          summarise(`#Outlier(Manual)` = sum(abs(diff) > diff_manual_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
                    .groups = "drop")
        
        # Non-NA from SELECTIVE data
        non_na_selective = raw_slice_selective %>% filter(!is.na(diff))
        
        # Tukey outliers (computed on selective data)
        tb = compute_tukey_bounds(raw_slice_selective)
        tukey_tbl = non_na_selective %>%
          inner_join(tb, by = "method") %>%
          group_by(method) %>%
          summarise(`#Tukey` = sum(diff < lower | diff > upper, na.rm = TRUE),
                    .groups = "drop")
        
        # #Shown (all non-NA values in selective data)
        shown_tbl = non_na_selective %>%
          group_by(method) %>%
          summarise(`#Shown` = n(), .groups = "drop")
        
        # Combine
        combo = nas %>%
          full_join(manual_tbl, by = "method") %>%
          full_join(tukey_tbl,  by = "method") %>%
          full_join(shown_tbl,  by = "method") %>%
          mutate(across(c(`#NA`, `#Outlier(Manual)`, `#Tukey`, `#Shown`), ~ replace_na(., 0L))) %>%
          filter(method %in% method_levels) %>%
          arrange(factor(method, levels = method_levels)) %>%
          mutate(Panel = paste(data_type, outcome_type, vs_type, sep = "_")) %>%
          select(Method = method, `#NA`, `#Outlier(Manual)`, `#Tukey`, `#Shown`, Panel)
        
        all_rows[[length(all_rows) + 1]] = combo
      }
    }
  }
  
  bind_rows(all_rows)
}

###############################################################################
##  2.  Plot function for differences (uses SELECTIVE data) ------------------
###############################################################################
make_diff_plot_selective = function(panel_df, outcome_type) {
  
  # Set factor levels based on outcome type
  if (outcome_type == "binary") {
    method_levels = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA", "G-Logistic", "DML", "TMLE", "IPW")
  } else {
    method_levels = c("ANCOVA", "ANHECOVA", "DML", "TMLE", "IPW")  # no G-Logistic
  }
  
  # Filter to non-NA only (selective outlier removal already applied)
  data = panel_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(diff)) %>%
    mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_levels))
  
  # Counts for labels
  method_counts = data %>%
    group_by(method) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
  
  # x-axis label positions
  x_labels_df = data.frame(
    method = method_levels[method_levels %in% unique(data$method)],
    x_pos   = 1:length(method_levels[method_levels %in% unique(data$method)])
  )
  
  x_labels_counts = x_labels_df %>%
    left_join(method_counts, by = "method")
  
  p = ggplot(data, aes(method, diff, fill = method)) +
    geom_boxplot(colour = "grey25", alpha = .50, width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = method_colors) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Difference from Unadjusted Estimate") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3, 3), clip = "off") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(-3, -1.5, 0, 1.5, 3)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x  = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 16),
      axis.title.y  = element_text(size = 18),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      legend.position  = "none",
      plot.margin      = margin(t = 5, r = 10, b = 60, l = 10)
    ) +
    geom_text(data = x_labels_counts, 
              aes(x = x_pos, y = -3.45, label = method),
              inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 5.5, lineheight = 0.85, hjust = 0.5) +
    geom_text(data = x_labels_counts, 
              aes(x = x_pos, y = -4.05, label = paste0("(", n, ")")),
              inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4.5, hjust = 0.5)
  
  return(p)
}

###############################################################################
##  3.  Create output directory ----------------------------------------------
###############################################################################
output_dir_selective = "cleaned_data/plot/exam plot"
dir.create(output_dir_selective, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

###############################################################################
##  4.  Generate all difference plots (SELECTIVE outlier removal) ------------
###############################################################################

# Helper to get panel slice from selective data
get_selective_panel = function(data_source, outcome_type, vs_type) {
  method_levels = .diff_method_set[[outcome_type]]
  data_source %>%
    filter(outcome_group == outcome_type,
           adjustment_type == vs_type,
           method %in% method_levels)
}

## ---- All outcomes (selective outlier removal)
# Binary
panel_bin_all = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_all, "binary", "All")
p_diff_binary_all_all_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_bin_all, "binary")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_binary_all_all_selective.png"),
       p_diff_binary_all_all_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

panel_bin_top3 = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_all, "binary", "Top-3")
p_diff_binary_top3_all_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_bin_top3, "binary")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_binary_top3_all_selective.png"),
       p_diff_binary_top3_all_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

panel_bin_base = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_all, "binary", "Baseline+")
p_diff_binary_baseline_all_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_bin_base, "binary")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_binary_baseline_all_selective.png"),
       p_diff_binary_baseline_all_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

# Continuous
panel_con_all = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_all, "continuous", "All")
p_diff_cont_all_all_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_con_all, "continuous")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_continuous_all_all_selective.png"),
       p_diff_cont_all_all_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

panel_con_top3 = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_all, "continuous", "Top-3")
p_diff_cont_top3_all_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_con_top3, "continuous")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_continuous_top3_all_selective.png"),
       p_diff_cont_top3_all_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

panel_con_base = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_all, "continuous", "Baseline+")
p_diff_cont_baseline_all_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_con_base, "continuous")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_continuous_baseline_all_selective.png"),
       p_diff_cont_baseline_all_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

## ---- Primary outcomes (selective outlier removal)
# Binary
panel_bin_all_p = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_primary, "binary", "All")
p_diff_binary_all_primary_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_bin_all_p, "binary")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_binary_all_primary_selective.png"),
       p_diff_binary_all_primary_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

panel_bin_top3_p = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_primary, "binary", "Top-3")
p_diff_binary_top3_primary_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_bin_top3_p, "binary")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_binary_top3_primary_selective.png"),
       p_diff_binary_top3_primary_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

panel_bin_base_p = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_primary, "binary", "Baseline+")
p_diff_binary_baseline_primary_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_bin_base_p, "binary")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_binary_baseline_primary_selective.png"),
       p_diff_binary_baseline_primary_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

# Continuous
panel_con_all_p = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_primary, "continuous", "All")
p_diff_cont_all_primary_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_con_all_p, "continuous")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_continuous_all_primary_selective.png"),
       p_diff_cont_all_primary_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

panel_con_top3_p = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_primary, "continuous", "Top-3")
p_diff_cont_top3_primary_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_con_top3_p, "continuous")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_continuous_top3_primary_selective.png"),
       p_diff_cont_top3_primary_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

panel_con_base_p = get_selective_panel(df_long_diff_selective_primary, "continuous", "Baseline+")
p_diff_cont_baseline_primary_selective = make_diff_plot_selective(panel_con_base_p, "continuous")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_selective, "difference_continuous_baseline_primary_selective.png"),
       p_diff_cont_baseline_primary_selective, width = pub_width, height = pub_height, dpi = pub_dpi, bg = "white")

###############################################################################
##  5.  Build comprehensive table (SELECTIVE outlier removal) ----------------
###############################################################################
comprehensive_diff_table_selective = build_comprehensive_diff_table_selective()

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("Comprehensive DIFFERENCE table (SELECTIVE Manual Outlier Removal)\n")
cat("SELECTIVE outlier removal for PLOTTING:\n")
cat("  - ANHECOVA continuous All (|diff| > 8)\n")
cat("  - All other methods show full data\n")
cat("#NA calculated on ORIGINAL raw data\n")
cat(paste0("Manual threshold: |diff| > ", diff_manual_threshold, "\n"))
cat("========================================\n\n")
print(comprehensive_diff_table_selective)

###############################################################################
##  6.  Count removed outliers -----------------------------------------------
###############################################################################
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("OUTLIER REMOVAL IMPACT\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Count outliers removed for ANHECOVA continuous All
cat("ANHECOVA continuous All outliers removed:\n")
anhecova_cont_all_outliers = df_long_diff_full_all %>%
  filter(method == "ANHECOVA", adjustment_type == "All", outcome_group == "continuous", !is.na(diff)) %>%
  mutate(is_outlier = abs(diff) > diff_manual_threshold) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    outliers_removed = sum(is_outlier),
    pct_removed = 100 * outliers_removed / total
  )

print(anhecova_cont_all_outliers)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("All plots saved to:", output_dir_selective, "\n")
cat("All plots saved at publication quality (600 dpi, white background)\n")
cat("Boxplots use outlier.shape=NA to hide Tukey outliers\n")

cat("  - All other methods show full data\n")

# Display all 12 plots in console

print(p_diff_cont_baseline_primary_selective)
```
